metadata.description:

Renders best on Chrome.

Made with code and ❤️ by pifragile.

metadata.name: Linescapes #213
metadata.description:
Lines escape their boundaries.

Made in p5js. Artwork is released under CC BY-NC 4.0.

metadata.name: Gate to nowhere #27
metadata.description:
Still around the corner, a new road and a new gate can wait for us, only to discover they lead nowhere.

Press [s] to save the output .png format (press [h] wait for rendering, then press [s] to save at higher resolution).

Better experience in live mode.

Generative artwork by Gandhiavelli, @gandhiavelli. Made with p5js in February 2023.

metadata.name: 0xDrue #47
metadata.description:
The core of this series is a recursive function that splits the canvas into smaller subsections based on the golden ratio. Each piece samples a different noise space in order to determine the recursion depth at each position in the image.

Zürich, December 2021
❤️ pifragile

metadata.name: Meow’s Playground #80
metadata.description:
Welcome to 'Meow's Playroom,' where you step into the playful world of a cat. Inside the cozy room, a retro TV screen lights up with an exciting game.

Guide our feline friend through a nostalgic journey, helping it dodge obstacles in this interactive experience.

Each iteration will feature a unique room with different elements and colors for you to explore.

You can play with the console using either the keyboard or the touchscreen, and capture a screenshot by pressing the 'S' key.

metadata.name: Flow 2 #12
metadata.description:
This series is a collection of animations based on noise fields and fluid dynamics. The pieces are designed to run continuously, and they produce slowly evolving images that seem to drip, swirl, pulse, and flow. Dense networks of patterns emerge and decay as the pieces evolve. Because of their subtle movement, these works make excellent wall art when run on a display monitor.

Flow 2 is somewhat less chaotic and more meditative than the original. It employs different brushstrokes and a different decay algorithm. I also added a number of new color palettes, now 35 in all.

While these animations are most interesting to view at larger sizes, if your performance begins to suffer just reduce the size of your viewing window.

-spacebar will pause the animation

-return will resume the animation

-r will restart the animation

Flow 2, 2022
-hieroglyphica

metadata.name: Proto alphabet #99
metadata.description:
For more than 4000 years, before Lineal A in Crete, proto alphabets were created. They freed man from the chains of evolution and gave a way to record the rhythm of the passage of time.

As recursion generates a grammar, recursion generates the strokes that shape the following proto alphabets, which attempt to record the passage of time.

Time is the substance I am made of. Time is a river which sweeps me along, but I am the river; it is a tiger which destroys me, but I am the tiger; it is a fire which consumes me, but I am the fire. - Jorge Luis Borges


Desde hace más de 4000 años, antes Lineal A en Creta, proto alfabetos fueron creados. Liberaron al hombre de las cadenas de la evolución y dieron una forma para registrar el ritmo del paso del tiempo.

Como la recursividad genera una gramática, la recursividad genera los trazos que dan forma a los siguientes proto alfabetos, los cuales intentan registrar el paso del tiempo.

El tiempo es la sustancia de que estoy hecho. El tiempo es un río que me arrebata, pero yo soy el río; es un tigre que me destroza, pero yo soy el tigre; es un fuego que me consume, pero yo soy el fuego. - Jorge Luis Borges


Controls (in live view):
- Press s to get a PNG file
- Press S to get a SVG file

Artwork by x0y0z0 @x0y0z0tn (2023)

metadata.name: 0xEis #8
metadata.description:
3 Color Schemes
2 Rotations
2 Grid Modes
Lots of randomness :)

Made with ❤️ by pifragile.

metadata.name: 0xFoif #54
metadata.description:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
NOTE TO COLLECTORS:

This token will be sold as a Dutch auction. Every 5 minutes, the price will change based on the following schedule:
20 / 15 / 10 / 5 / 2 tez

After that, the price will remain fixed at 2 tez.
If there are tokens remaining after 72 hours, they will be burnt.
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

0xFoif

Inspired by Tyler Hobbs' water color studies and the splitting algorithm of 0xDrue, 0xFoif is a collection of interplay between a strong grid with clear cut splits and a blurriness introduced by multiple transparent layers.

Zürich/Quito, January 2022
❤️ pifragile
